title: scolymocephalus scaber
intro: Scolymocephalus scaber, a lesser-known plant species, is commonly referred to as the "dune evening primrose" due to its ability to thrive in dry, sandy environments. Traditionally, Scolymocephalus scaber has been used for its medicinal properties, including its potential to reduce inflammation and treat various skin conditions. The plant is also believed to offer several health benefits, such as improving digestion and reducing stress, although more research is needed to confirm these claims. In herbal preparations, Scolymocephalus scaber is often used in teas, infusions, and salves, which can be applied topically to the skin to take advantage of its purported benefits.
